case_title: WIESLAW MNICH VS. S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF MNICH, WIESLAW
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,499.00 FILED BY MNICH, WIESLAW AS TO DEFENDANT S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-19-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S SON WALDERMAR MNICH INTERPRETS ENGLISH/POLISH - POLISH/ENGLISH ON HIS BEHALF. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-27-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED".
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY MNICH, WIESLAW S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MNICH, WIESLAW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC $6,844.79 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,949.79, COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT FAILED TO MEET ITS BURDEN OF EXTABLISHING "SUPERSEDING CAUSATION" SUCH AS TO AVOID LIABILTY FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC
